testcase.name: test_get_subscription_prices_new_packages

failure.message: AssertionError: Bronze package should be in prices assert 'bronze' in {'currency': 'USD', 'prices': {'basic': {'monthly': 100.0, 'name': 'أساسي'}, 'bronze': {'monthly': 15.0, 'name': 'برونزية'}, 'demo': {'monthly': 0, 'name': 'عرض'}, 'gold': {'monthly': 50.0, 'name': 'ذهبية'}, ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_packages_iter39.py:199: in test_get_subscription_prices_new_packages assert "bronze" in data, "Bronze package should be in prices" E AssertionError: Bronze package should be in prices E assert 'bronze' in {'currency': 'USD', 'prices': {'basic': {'monthly': 100.0, 'name': 'أساسي'}, 'bronze': {'monthly': 15.0, 'name': 'برونزية'}, 'demo': {'monthly': 0, 'name': 'عرض'}, 'gold': {'monthly': 50.0, 'name': 'ذهبية'}, ...}}

testcase.name: test_save_subscription_prices

failure.message: AssertionError: Bronze price not saved correctly assert None == 20 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06580>('monthly') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06580> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06cc0>('bronze', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06cc0> = {'currency': 'USD', 'prices': {'basic': {'monthly': 25.0, 'name': 'أساسي'}, 'bronze': {'monthly': 20.0, 'name': 'برونزية'}, 'demo': {'monthly': 0, 'name': 'عرض'}, 'gold': {'monthly': 60.0, 'name': 'ذهبية'}, ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_packages_iter39.py:234: in test_save_subscription_prices assert saved_prices.get("bronze", {}).get("monthly") == 20, "Bronze price not saved correctly" E AssertionError: Bronze price not saved correctly E assert None == 20 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06580>('monthly') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06580> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06cc0>('bronze', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4c9ad06cc0> = {'currency': 'USD', 'prices': {'basic': {'monthly': 25.0, 'name': 'أساسي'}, 'bronze': {'monthly': 20.0, 'name': 'برونزية'}, 'demo': {'monthly': 0, 'name': 'عرض'}, 'gold': {'monthly': 60.0, 'name': 'ذهبية'}, ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_notification_settings_default_15_days
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_packages_iter39.py:259: in test_notification_settings_default_15_days assert days_before_expiry == 15, f"Expected 15 days, got {days_before_expiry}" E AssertionError: Expected 15 days, got 7 E assert 7 == 15

testcase.name: test_email_notifications_disabled_by_default

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected email_notifications=False, got True assert True == False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_packages_iter39.py:272: in test_email_notifications_disabled_by_default assert email_notifications == False, f"Expected email_notifications=False, got {email_notifications}" E AssertionError: Expected email_notifications=False, got True E assert True == False
